name: Hugging Face MCP Server
what_it_does: Hugging Face MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with the Hugging Face ecosystem — running model inference via Inference API, searching and discovering models from the Hub, accessing datasets, and integrating the world's largest open model repository into agent workflows.
use_cases: Running inference on thousands of open models from research agents
Discovering and comparing models for specific tasks from ML engineering agents
Accessing and processing ML datasets from data science agents
Integrating specialized models (vision, NLP, audio) from multimodal agents
Benchmarking models against tasks from evaluation agents
Deploying Inference Endpoints for production model serving from MLOps agents
not_for: Teams using OpenAI, Anthropic, or Groq exclusively (HuggingFace is open model focused)
Production inference at scale without Inference Endpoints (Serverless API is rate-limited)
Teams needing SLA guarantees on inference latency (use Inference Endpoints)
best_when: An agent needs to access open models from HuggingFace Hub for inference, dataset access, or model discovery.
avoid_when: You need GPT-4o, Claude, or other proprietary models — or if you need guaranteed inference SLAs without Inference Endpoints.

auth.notes: HuggingFace User Access Token (read or write). Token type (read-only vs fine-grained) determines access. Fine-grained tokens allow per-repo permissions.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Serverless Inference API: free with rate limits per model
pricing.paid_tiers: Pro: $9/month (higher inference limits); Inference Endpoints: from $0.06/hr
pricing.notes: Serverless Inference API is free but rate-limited. Pro account removes most limits. Inference Endpoints for dedicated production inference. MCP server is community open source.

performance.rate_limits: Serverless: varies per model and tier; Inference Endpoints: dedicated compute

known_agent_gotchas: Serverless Inference API is rate-limited and may return 503 when model is loading (cold start)
Model loading can take 20-60 seconds on cold start — agents must handle timeouts
Input format varies significantly by model — no universal input schema
Some models require gated access — agents must request and be approved for access
Community MCP server — endpoint coverage may be limited to common inference tasks
Free tier rate limits can block agents during high-volume operations
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Access tokens with optional fine-grained per-repo scopes. GDPR. Community MCP server — audit before production use. Gated models require explicit access approval.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Fine-grained access tokens available. GDPR. Community MCP server. Gated models require explicit access grant.
